description: Immutable official Germany federal statute and regulation scopes used by RuleSpec-DE (dual-oracle lane: EUROMOD DE_2025 + GETTSIM). Composes the byte-identical 2026-07-16 gesetze-im-internet consolidations with the 2025-era operative instruments: the SteFeG amendment act (BGBl. 2024 I Nr. 449 — 2025 Kindergeld 255 EUR, Grundfreibetrag 12096 EUR, SolzG Freigrenze 19950 EUR, amendment-marked with machine-readable targets), RBSFV 2025 (BGBl. 2024 I Nr. 312), PBAV 2025, MiLoV4 and BSV 2018.
name: de-rulespec-2026-07-21
